summary: Frontend-only visual/integration verification of the iteration_7 'HOMEPAGE AIRY-TRIM' CSS layer (lines ~4392-4456 of /app/php-version/assets/css/style.css). All five review scenarios PASSED. Computed-style metrics on the live preview URL exactly match the spec values quoted in the review request: hero padding 64/72px, trust strip 10/10px, section py-5 64/72px, card radius 9px, card shadow rgba(15,23,42,0.04) 0 1px 2px. Homepage content checks confirm the trimmed hero now shows only two stats (24/7 Instant Delivery + 15-30min Delivery Time) with '50K+' / 'Happy Customers' fully removed. Dark mode via theme-toggle keeps the navy gradient trust strip and applies the subtle rgba(255,255,255,.03) card surface as designed. /shop.php and /about-us.php inherit the lighter card elevation and tighter section rhythm through the body:not(.adm) cascade. Theme toggle is live and round-trips cleanly. Overall, the page reads as 'lighter, less bulky' per user feedback.
action_items: Non-blocking: /product.php?slug=microsoft-office-home-2024 returns 'Product not found' — the seeded slug for the 'Microsoft Office Home 2024 (PC)' product (visible on /shop.php) is different. Update the canonical slug in the sample URL or seed an alias so the example link in marketing/docs resolves. This is NOT a CSS regression.
critical_code_review_comments: Airy-trim block is well-scoped via body:not(.adm) and html:not([data-bs-theme=dark]) — admin shell untouched and prior dark-mode trust-strip fix continues to work.

Heavy use of !important across rules 1-7 is acceptable here because they are overriding Bootstrap utility classes (.py-5/.py-4) and earlier theme rules; however, future tweaks should consider moving to a higher-specificity selector strategy or a CSS layer to reduce the !important sprawl.

style.css is now 4453 lines — borderline for the 'split >700 lines' guideline. Recommend splitting per-component (hero.css, cards.css, trust-strip.css, dark-mode.css) in a follow-up cleanup pass; not blocking for this iteration.
test_credentials: Not required - all checks on public storefront pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 airy-trim CSS layer is confirmed working. Live metrics captured via Playwright (computed-style): hero .hero--zoom-navy padding 64/72px, .trust-strip-band padding 10/10px, section.py-5 padding 64/72px, .card border-radius 9px + box-shadow rgba(15,23,42,0.04) 0 1px 2px, dark-mode .card bg rgba(255,255,255,0.03) / border rgba(255,255,255,0.06). Theme toggle selector that worked: [data-testid='theme-toggle']. Hero stats grid is now 2 items only (24/7 + 15-30min); '50K+' / 'Happy Customers' fully removed. The CSS is scoped via body:not(.adm) so admin shell is untouched. Note: horizontal product 'strip-card' rows are intentional horizontal scrollers (children extend beyond viewport.right) — not a layout bug. Sample product URL microsoft-office-home-2024 currently 404s; use a slug from /shop.php when retesting product page.
rca of the issue: N/A — verification iteration, no bug found. The implementation matches the user's 'make it light' intent and all promised computed-style values.
